features.name: DDD project scaffold
features.behavior: Repository contains a buildable Java 17 Maven multi-module DDD hexagonal architecture scaffold for the Digital Employee system.
features.evidence: 2026-05-23: `mvn clean install -DskipTests` completed with BUILD SUCCESS for all 8 modules.

features.name: Agent harness constraints
features.behavior: Repository contains startup, feature-state, architecture, verification, progress, and handoff artifacts so future agent sessions can continue without drifting.
features.evidence: 2026-05-23: `./init.sh` passed. It validated feature_list.json, checked DDD architecture boundaries, and completed `mvn clean install -DskipTests` with BUILD SUCCESS.

features.name: First digital employee capability
features.behavior: Define and implement the first concrete Digital Employee business capability after the user provides requirements.
features.verification: To be set when requirements are known; must include at least `./init.sh` plus feature-specific tests or API checks.
features.evidence: Blocked until the user specifies the first business capability.

features.name: Claude Code domain runtime slice
features.behavior: Migrate the Claude Code core agent runtime concept into the Digital Employee DDD framework with a usable conversation API, tool permission decision, file-read tool execution, and recorded turn output.
features.evidence: 2026-05-23: TDD red verified first with missing ConversationMessageRequestDTO. Green verification passed with `mvn -pl digital-employee-app -am test -DskipTests=false -Dtest=DigitalEmployeeConversationApiTest -Dsurefire.failIfNoSpecifiedTests=false` (1 test, 0 failures, 0 errors). `bash scripts/check-architecture.sh` passed. `./init.sh` passed with BUILD SUCCESS for all 8 modules. Manual runtime check passed: started app module on port 8091 and `POST /api/v1/conversations/manual-check/messages` with `请读取 AGENTS.md` returned code `0000`, `file_read`, `allow`, and AGENTS.md content.

features.name: Model decision port
features.behavior: Conversation runtime asks a Domain-defined model decision port for the next action, with a deterministic infrastructure adapter that can choose file_read from natural file-inspection prompts without hardcoding prompt parsing inside Domain.
features.evidence: 2026-05-23: TDD red verified with `帮我看一下 AGENTS.md` returning no tool execution before the port. Green verification passed with `mvn -pl digital-employee-app -am test -DskipTests=false -Dtest=DigitalEmployeeConversationApiTest -Dsurefire.failIfNoSpecifiedTests=false` (2 tests, 0 failures, 0 errors). `bash scripts/check-architecture.sh` passed. `./init.sh` passed with BUILD SUCCESS for all 8 modules.

features.name: Workspace traversal denial
features.behavior: Domain permission rules deny every file_read request containing parent-directory traversal before Infrastructure reads from the workspace.
features.evidence: 2026-05-23: TDD red first failed as expected with `expected:<DENY> but was:<ALLOW>` for `AGENTS.md/..`. Green verification passed with `mvn -pl digital-employee-domain test -DskipTests=false -Dtest=PermissionDomainServiceTest` (1 test, 0 failures, 0 errors). `bash scripts/check-architecture.sh` passed. `./init.sh` passed with BUILD SUCCESS for all 8 modules.

features.name: Tool registry domain model
features.behavior: Conversation runtime resolves model-requested tools through a Domain tool registry so unsupported tool calls return an explicit answer and future tools can be added without hardcoding every decision branch.
features.evidence: 2026-05-23: TDD red first failed because `ToolRegistryDomainService` did not exist; second red exposed unsupported tool answer as null. Green verification passed with `mvn -pl digital-employee-domain test -DskipTests=false -Dtest=ToolRegistryDomainServiceTest,ConversationRuntimeServiceTest` (2 tests, 0 failures, 0 errors). App vertical-slice regression passed with `mvn -pl digital-employee-app -am test -DskipTests=false -Dtest=DigitalEmployeeConversationApiTest -Dsurefire.failIfNoSpecifiedTests=false` (2 tests, 0 failures, 0 errors). `bash scripts/check-architecture.sh` passed. `./init.sh` passed with BUILD SUCCESS for all 8 modules.

features.name: Tool descriptor metadata
features.behavior: Domain tool registry exposes immutable tool descriptors with name, description, and default permission behavior so model prompts and permission surfaces can be generated from Domain metadata.
features.evidence: 2026-05-23: TDD red first failed because `ToolDescriptorVO` did not exist. Green verification passed with `mvn -pl digital-employee-domain test -DskipTests=false -Dtest=ToolRegistryDomainServiceTest` (2 tests, 0 failures, 0 errors). Related domain regression passed with `mvn -pl digital-employee-domain test -DskipTests=false -Dtest=ToolRegistryDomainServiceTest,ConversationRuntimeServiceTest,PermissionDomainServiceTest` (4 tests, 0 failures, 0 errors). `bash scripts/check-architecture.sh` passed. `./init.sh` passed with BUILD SUCCESS for all 8 modules.

features.name: Task lifecycle domain model
features.behavior: Domain models Digital Employee task lifecycle with task type, status, generated id prefix, creation metadata, terminal status rules, and valid status transitions based on Claude Code's Task core.
features.evidence: 2026-05-23: TDD red first failed because task Domain packages did not exist. Green verification passed with `mvn -pl digital-employee-domain test -DskipTests=false -Dtest=TaskLifecycleDomainServiceTest` (3 tests, 0 failures, 0 errors). `bash scripts/check-architecture.sh` passed. `./init.sh` passed with BUILD SUCCESS for all 8 modules.

features.name: Task creation API slice
features.behavior: Expose task lifecycle through the DDD vertical slice with API DTOs, Case orchestration, an in-memory Infrastructure repository, and HTTP endpoint to create a Digital Employee task.
features.evidence: 2026-05-23: TDD red first failed because `TaskCreateRequestDTO` did not exist. Green verification passed with `mvn -pl digital-employee-app -am test -DskipTests=false -Dtest=DigitalEmployeeTaskApiTest -Dsurefire.failIfNoSpecifiedTests=false` (1 test, 0 failures, 0 errors). `bash scripts/check-architecture.sh` passed. `./init.sh` passed with BUILD SUCCESS for all 8 modules.

features.name: Model decision request context
features.behavior: Conversation runtime calls the model decision port with a structured request containing conversation id, user message, and available Domain tool descriptors instead of separate primitive arguments.

features.name: Memory context domain slice
features.behavior: Domain models memory context entries and builds a bounded context block for a conversation so future model decisions can receive project/session memory without reading chat history.
features.evidence: 2026-05-23: TDD red first failed because memory Domain packages did not exist. Green verification passed with `mvn -pl digital-employee-domain test -DskipTests=false -Dtest=MemoryContextDomainServiceTest` (1 test, 0 failures, 0 errors). `bash scripts/check-architecture.sh` passed. `./init.sh` passed with BUILD SUCCESS for all 8 modules.

features.name: Runtime acceptance checkpoint
features.behavior: The migrated Digital Employee runtime exposes a verified minimal backend acceptance path: create a task, submit a conversation message, model decision selects file_read, permission allows workspace read, and response records tool execution.
features.evidence: 2026-05-23: Acceptance verification passed with `mvn -pl digital-employee-app -am test -DskipTests=false -Dtest=DigitalEmployeeTaskApiTest,DigitalEmployeeConversationApiTest -Dsurefire.failIfNoSpecifiedTests=false` (3 tests, 0 failures, 0 errors). `bash scripts/check-architecture.sh` passed. `./init.sh` passed with BUILD SUCCESS for all 8 modules.

features.name: Task query and transition API
features.behavior: Expose task retrieval, task listing, and task lifecycle transitions through HTTP so the Digital Employee runtime can inspect and advance in-memory tasks after creation.
features.evidence: 2026-05-23: TDD red first failed as expected because `GET /api/v1/tasks/{taskId}` returned 404 before the endpoints existed. Green verification passed with `mvn -pl digital-employee-app -am test -DskipTests=false -Dtest=DigitalEmployeeTaskApiTest -Dsurefire.failIfNoSpecifiedTests=false` (2 tests, 0 failures, 0 errors). `bash scripts/check-architecture.sh` passed. `./init.sh` passed with BUILD SUCCESS for all 8 modules while the feature was active.

features.name: Memory context decision injection
features.behavior: Conversation runtime includes a bounded memory context block in the structured model decision request so future model providers can decide with project and session memory.
features.evidence: 2026-05-23: TDD red first failed because `ConversationRuntimeService` had no memory-context constructor and `ModelDecisionRequestVO` had no `getMemoryContext()`. Green verification passed with `mvn -pl digital-employee-domain test -DskipTests=false -Dtest=ConversationRuntimeServiceTest` (3 tests, 0 failures, 0 errors). `bash scripts/check-architecture.sh` passed. `./init.sh` passed with BUILD SUCCESS for all 8 modules while the feature was active.

features.name: Model provider boundary
features.behavior: Model decision adapters expose provider metadata through a Domain-owned boundary so deterministic local execution and future external model gateways can be selected without changing conversation runtime rules.
features.evidence: 2026-05-23: TDD red first failed because Domain had no `ModelProviderVO`. Green verification passed with `mvn -pl digital-employee-infrastructure -am test -DskipTests=false -Dtest=DeterministicModelDecisionPortTest -Dsurefire.failIfNoSpecifiedTests=false` (1 test, 0 failures, 0 errors). `bash scripts/check-architecture.sh` passed. `./init.sh` passed with BUILD SUCCESS for all 8 modules while the feature was active.

features.name: File write tool permission slice
features.behavior: Conversation runtime supports a registered file_write tool that writes UTF-8 content inside the workspace only after Domain permission checks deny empty, absolute, or parent-directory traversal paths.
features.evidence: 2026-05-24: TDD red first failed because Domain had no `IWorkspaceFileWritePort`; API red later confirmed deterministic model decisions did not yet choose `file_write`. Green verification passed with `mvn -pl digital-employee-domain test -DskipTests=false -Dtest=PermissionDomainServiceTest,ToolRegistryDomainServiceTest,ConversationRuntimeServiceTest` (9 tests, 0 failures, 0 errors). API regression passed with `mvn -pl digital-employee-app -am test -DskipTests=false -Dtest=DigitalEmployeeConversationApiTest -Dsurefire.failIfNoSpecifiedTests=false` (3 tests, 0 failures, 0 errors). `bash scripts/check-architecture.sh` passed. `./init.sh` passed with BUILD SUCCESS for all 8 modules while the feature was active.

features.name: File edit tool permission slice
features.behavior: Conversation runtime supports a registered file_edit tool that edits a workspace file by replacing an expected text fragment after Domain permission checks and before writing the updated content through the workspace write port.
features.verification: mvn -pl digital-employee-domain test -DskipTests=false -Dtest=ToolRegistryDomainServiceTest,ConversationRuntimeServiceTest && mvn -pl digital-employee-app -am test -DskipTests=false -Dtest=DigitalEmployeeConversationApiTest -Dsurefire.failIfNoSpecifiedTests=false && bash scripts/check-architecture.sh && ./init.sh
features.evidence: 2026-05-24: TDD red first failed because `file_edit` was not registered and runtime did not write edited content. API red later confirmed deterministic model decisions did not yet choose `file_edit`. Green verification passed with `mvn -pl digital-employee-domain test -DskipTests=false -Dtest=ToolRegistryDomainServiceTest,ConversationRuntimeServiceTest` (9 tests, 0 failures, 0 errors). API regression passed with `mvn -pl digital-employee-app -am test -DskipTests=false -Dtest=DigitalEmployeeConversationApiTest -Dsurefire.failIfNoSpecifiedTests=false` (4 tests, 0 failures, 0 errors). `bash scripts/check-architecture.sh` passed. `./init.sh` passed with BUILD SUCCESS for all 8 modules while the feature was active.

features.name: Bash command permission policy boundary
features.behavior: Conversation runtime supports a registered bash tool boundary that evaluates shell commands through a conservative Domain permission policy and returns an explicit non-execution result until real shell execution is intentionally enabled.
features.evidence: 2026-05-24: TDD red first failed because `PermissionDomainService` did not have `decideBashCommand`. API red later confirmed deterministic model decisions returned a direct answer instead of choosing `bash` for `运行 ls docs`. Green verification passed with `mvn -pl digital-employee-domain test -DskipTests=false -Dtest=PermissionDomainServiceTest,ToolRegistryDomainServiceTest,ConversationRuntimeServiceTest` (16 tests, 0 failures, 0 errors). API regression passed with `mvn -pl digital-employee-app -am test -DskipTests=false -Dtest=DigitalEmployeeConversationApiTest -Dsurefire.failIfNoSpecifiedTests=false` (5 tests, 0 failures, 0 errors). `bash scripts/check-architecture.sh` passed. `./init.sh` passed with feature_list.json valid (19 features, 0 active), DDD boundaries verified, and BUILD SUCCESS for all 8 modules.

features.name: Shell command execution port skeleton
features.behavior: Conversation runtime owns a Domain shell command execution port and command result value object so allowed bash commands can be routed to a configured adapter, while the default runtime remains explicitly disabled.
features.verification: mvn -pl digital-employee-domain test -DskipTests=false -Dtest=ConversationRuntimeServiceTest && mvn -pl digital-employee-app -am test -DskipTests=false -Dtest=DigitalEmployeeConversationApiTest -Dsurefire.failIfNoSpecifiedTests=false && bash scripts/check-architecture.sh && ./init.sh
features.evidence: 2026-05-24: TDD red first failed because Domain had no `IShellCommandPort` and no `ShellCommandResultVO`. Green verification passed with `mvn -pl digital-employee-domain test -DskipTests=false -Dtest=ConversationRuntimeServiceTest` (8 tests, 0 failures, 0 errors). API regression passed with `mvn -pl digital-employee-app -am test -DskipTests=false -Dtest=DigitalEmployeeConversationApiTest -Dsurefire.failIfNoSpecifiedTests=false` (5 tests, 0 failures, 0 errors). `bash scripts/check-architecture.sh` passed. `./init.sh` passed with feature_list.json valid (20 features, 0 active), DDD boundaries verified, and BUILD SUCCESS for all 8 modules.

features.name: Workspace-safe shell command adapter
features.behavior: Infrastructure provides a workspace-root constrained shell command adapter for already-permitted read-only bash commands, and the Spring conversation vertical slice returns captured command output for safe commands.
features.verification: mvn -pl digital-employee-infrastructure -am test -DskipTests=false -Dtest=WorkspaceShellCommandPortTest -Dsurefire.failIfNoSpecifiedTests=false && mvn -pl digital-employee-app -am test -DskipTests=false -Dtest=DigitalEmployeeConversationApiTest -Dsurefire.failIfNoSpecifiedTests=false && bash scripts/check-architecture.sh && ./init.sh

App red also failed at Infrastructure test compilation before the Spring conversation slice could run. Green verification passed with `mvn -pl digital-employee-infrastructure -am test -DskipTests=false -Dtest=WorkspaceShellCommandPortTest -Dsurefire.failIfNoSpecifiedTests=false` (4 tests, 0 failures, 0 errors). API regression passed with `mvn -pl digital-employee-app -am test -DskipTests=false -Dtest=DigitalEmployeeConversationApiTest -Dsurefire.failIfNoSpecifiedTests=false` (5 tests, 0 failures, 0 errors). `bash scripts/check-architecture.sh` passed. `./init.sh` passed with feature_list.json valid (21 features, 0 active), DDD boundaries verified, and BUILD SUCCESS for all 8 modules.

features.name: Shell command output summary limit
features.behavior: Shell command results summarize stdout and stderr with a bounded preview so safe read-only commands cannot produce unbounded conversation responses.
features.verification: mvn -pl digital-employee-domain test -DskipTests=false -Dtest=ShellCommandResultVOTest,ConversationRuntimeServiceTest && mvn -pl digital-employee-app -am test -DskipTests=false -Dtest=DigitalEmployeeConversationApiTest -Dsurefire.failIfNoSpecifiedTests=false && bash scripts/check-architecture.sh && ./init.sh
features.evidence: 2026-05-24: TDD red first failed because `ShellCommandResultVO.summarize()` returned 1500-character stdout/stderr without truncation. Green verification passed with `mvn -pl digital-employee-domain test -DskipTests=false -Dtest=ShellCommandResultVOTest,ConversationRuntimeServiceTest` (10 tests, 0 failures, 0 errors). API regression passed with `mvn -pl digital-employee-app -am test -DskipTests=false -Dtest=DigitalEmployeeConversationApiTest -Dsurefire.failIfNoSpecifiedTests=false` (5 tests, 0 failures, 0 errors). `bash scripts/check-architecture.sh` passed. `./init.sh` passed with feature_list.json valid (22 features, 0 active), DDD boundaries verified, and BUILD SUCCESS for all 8 modules.

features.name: Unsafe shell command API denial regression
features.behavior: Conversation API returns Domain permission denial for unsafe bash prompts, including destructive commands and parent-directory traversal, without returning command execution output.
features.evidence: 2026-05-24: Regression-only TDD slice; new API tests for `运行 rm -rf target` and `运行 cat ../secret.txt` passed immediately because the existing Domain permission policy already denied destructive commands and parent-directory traversal. Verification passed with `mvn -pl digital-employee-app -am test -DskipTests=false -Dtest=DigitalEmployeeConversationApiTest -Dsurefire.failIfNoSpecifiedTests=false` (7 tests, 0 failures, 0 errors). `bash scripts/check-architecture.sh` passed. `./init.sh` passed with feature_list.json valid (23 features, 0 active), DDD boundaries verified, and BUILD SUCCESS for all 8 modules.

features.name: Conversation history repository API
features.behavior: Conversation turns are saved behind a Domain repository port and can be queried through a conversation history API by conversation id.
features.evidence: 2026-05-24: TDD red first failed because `GET /api/v1/conversations/{conversationId}/messages` returned 405 before the history endpoint existed. Green verification passed with `mvn -pl digital-employee-app -am test -DskipTests=false -Dtest=DigitalEmployeeConversationApiTest -Dsurefire.failIfNoSpecifiedTests=false` (8 tests, 0 failures, 0 errors). `bash scripts/check-architecture.sh` passed. `./init.sh` passed with feature_list.json valid (24 features, 0 active), DDD boundaries verified, and BUILD SUCCESS for all 8 modules.

features.name: Conversation history isolation regression
features.behavior: Conversation histories are isolated by conversation id so querying one conversation never returns messages from another conversation.
features.evidence: 2026-05-24: Regression-only TDD slice; new API test for `history-alpha` and `history-beta` passed immediately because the existing conversation repository groups messages by conversation id. Verification passed with `mvn -pl digital-employee-app -am test -DskipTests=false -Dtest=DigitalEmployeeConversationApiTest -Dsurefire.failIfNoSpecifiedTests=false` (9 tests, 0 failures, 0 errors). `bash scripts/check-architecture.sh` passed. Final `./init.sh` passed with feature_list.json valid (25 features, 0 active), DDD boundaries verified, and BUILD SUCCESS for all 8 modules.

features.name: File-backed conversation API persistence slice
features.behavior: When the Spring runtime is configured with `digital-employee.conversation.repository=file`, the conversation API writes history through the file-backed repository so a new repository instance can reload the messages from disk.
features.evidence: 2026-05-24: TDD setup first failed during test compilation because the new test used `javax.annotation.Resource`, which is not available in this Spring Boot 3 test classpath; after switching to `@Autowired`, the behavioral red failed because the assertion expected a non-existent English deterministic response string while the persisted assistant message used the existing Chinese default response. Green verification passed with `mvn -pl digital-employee-app -am test -DskipTests=false -Dtest=DigitalEmployeeFileConversationApiTest -Dsurefire.failIfNoSpecifiedTests=false` (1 test, 0 failures, 0 errors). `bash scripts/check-architecture.sh` passed. Final `./init.sh` passed with feature_list.json valid (35 features, 1 active before closure), DDD boundaries verified, and BUILD SUCCESS for all 8 modules.
